subtitle: Manage the icon shown for each sensor field on the Data Warehouse page. Upload an SVG to override a built-in icon.
deleteConfirm: Delete this custom icon? The field will revert to its built-in icon.

modal.title: Upload Icon
modal.keyPlaceholder: e.g. field1, field2, or any custom field4-field20
modal.keyExtraHint: Must match the field key as it appears in reported sensor data
modal.namePlaceholder: Optional, shown in the icon library

message.invalidFile: File content is not a valid SVG
